ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Last update date for the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "last_value" REAL /* Last recorded value of the economic metric */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous recorded value of the economic metric */,
  "reference_date" TEXT /* Reference date for the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the data type belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the unit belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data collection (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collection (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data release */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the data release */,
  "next_release_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled data release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes for the release */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the release (e.g., pending, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_releases_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
